Name: [Ether] Trashed Harpoon Gun
Desc: Inflicting <color=#fe437e>Corruption</color> on an enemy grants 1 stack of Activity to all squad members. <color=#fe437e>Corrupted</color> enemies have their <color=#fe437e>Ether RES</color> reduced by <color=#2BAD00>20%</color>.
Desc2: A firearm modified by Hollow Raiders using Ether technology—primitive, but highly effective.
